installation.title: Installation Guide
installation.description: Getting started with Board Games Tracker is straightforward. Follow these steps to set up your own instance:

quickStart.title: Quick Start Guide
quickStart.description: Follow these steps to quickly get your Board Games Tracker up and running:
quickStart.step1Description: Start by downloading the docker-compose.yml file from the repository:
quickStart.step2Description: Configure your environment variables in the .env file.
quickStart.step3Description: Once the server is running, open your browser and navigate to http://localhost:3000 to see your Board Games Tracker instance. You can now begin configuring your environment and adding your first games!

envVars.title: Environment Variables
envVars.description: Configure your application using environment variables:

jwtSecret.info: Used for signing JWT tokens. Change this to a strong, random value with a minimum of 64 characters.

dbPassword.info: Password used to connect to the database.

logLevel.info: Sets the logging level for the application. Possible values are debug, info, warn, error.

sentryLogging.info: Enables or disables the collection of usage statistics. Set to true to enable, false to disable.

authBypass.info: Set to true to disable authentication and allow anyone to access the application.

proxy.description: Set up a proxy to handle requests to your Board Games Tracker:
